title: An Ordinance Transferring the Amount of One Hundred Thousand Pesos (P100,000.00) From the Unexpected Balance for Personal Services (OVERTIME PAY OF MUNICIPAL PERSONNEL) During the Conduct of the May 13, 2019 Mid-term Elections to Maintenance and Other Operating Expense (MOOE) in Preparation for the 2020 Barangay Election Under the 2019 Annual Budget Election Reserve of the Municipality of Los Baños.
